name: one-star-risk
description: Re-score audit findings (a diff, a file, a TODO list, or another auditor's output) for App Store one-star-review risk. A judgment LENS, not a detector: it assigns each finding a band with a NAMED, overridable trigger, runs an aggressive skeptic pass that demotes any band it can't defend, and grounds in real competitor reviews via a pluggable provider seam (free App Store RSS default, optional paid Applyra adapter). Reports its grounding tier every run and degrades loudly when ungrounded.
